name: letsquiz-root
description: Root runner for LetsQuiz project containing backend and frontend

scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.rmSync('.next', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.cpSync('letsquiz/frontend/.next', '.next', { recursive: true }); fs.rmSync('public', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.cpSync('letsquiz/frontend/public', 'public', { recursive: true });" && node fix-vercel-build.js
